header.title: Gezicht op Riquewihr en omringende wijnvelden.jpg
header.description: View of Riquewihr and surrounding vineyards
header.author: JopkeB

header.title: Saint Margaret protestant church in Riquewihr 03.jpg
header.description:
View of the Saint Margaret protestant church from Rue de la Première-Armée in Riquewihr, Haut-Rhin, France




 
This building is indexed in the base Mérimée, a database of architectural heritage maintained by the French Ministry of Culture, under the reference IA68000778 .

photos.title: Dolder Riquewihr Christmas Market.jpg
photos.description: View into the direction of the Dolder in Riquewihr during the Christmas market 2019.
photos.author: Flocci Nivis

photos.title: Riquewihr Château 04.JPG
photos.description:
Alsace, Haut-Rhin, Riquewihr, Ancien château des Wurtemberg-Montbéliard (XVIe-XXe), actuellement musée, 1-3 Cour du Château. 





 
This building is classé au titre des monuments historiques de la France. It is indexed in the base Mérimée, a database of architectural heritage maintained by the French Ministry of Culture, under the references PA00085598   and IA68000789 .
